name: Las Vegas Helicopter Flight - Hanging outside of the helicopter - VR Travel

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback. This app features a real 360° helicopter flight over the Las Vegas Strip – not a game, not a simulation, and not CGI. The route takes you directly above the hotels and Strip, far closer than the typical tourist flights that stay distant. Many of our users say this offers a view of Vegas they never had before – even if they’ve been there in person. If you’ve been to Vegas already, this is a chance to revisit that feeling anytime – no stress, no planning, no extra cost.

reviews.review_description: Yeah just save your money. Should be free

developer_response.body: This VR experience is based on a real helicopter flight – with special clearance to fly directly over the Las Vegas Strip. That’s what makes it so unique: You fly right above the iconic hotel towers, unlike standard tourist flights that stay far outside the city. If you look closely, you can spot the blinking lights of those tourist helicopters on the distant horizon – while you’re flying straight through the heart of Vegas. A real experience, only possible here.

reviews.review_description: Helicopter just stays at one place and video is not visible. Biggest scam and needs to be taken down by meta. 0 stars option is not available otherwise would have given that.

reviews.review_title: Las Vegas is on my bucket list now!
reviews.review_description:
Great idea, flying over Las Vegas in the evening hours. Seeing all these famous and striking hotels from above you get the desire to get into these hotels and to back the right horse, have just fun.

in this VR flight I see not only the city from above but also the chopper by virtually being inside this very chopper. Nice.

Every helicopter per se is quite unstable and taking even perfect ordinary photos is nearly impossible, I know this from NYC helicopter tour. To ensure perfect image stabilization you would need to engage a rooster for this purpose, meaning taking a bird on board of anorher bird ;))
Find videos on this topic on YT, "Testing rooster's head stabilization: The ultimate experiment!" Or sort of...
What's going on the apps are crap

reviews.review_title: Scam Don't buy - Can't even get a refund
reviews.review_description: False representation of the game from the demo photos. This app is horrible. Streams content that is absolute garbage quality. What a waste of money. Buyer beware. Take this down Meta!
Video is burry and hard to watch
The quality of the video is like so pixelated it’s like a 1999 video, not even. And takes forever to load. WHAT A SCAM.
